articles.title: Ukrainian Defence Ministry Advisor Drops Bizarre UFOs Encountered By Military Amid Pentagon's Disclosure [WATCH]
articles.summary: Serhii Beskrestnov, a senior advisor to Ukraine's Minister of Defense, revealed that the Ukrainian Armed Forces have a formal program for tracking and studying unidentified flying objects that has been active since the early days of the war with Russia. He said the program operates under an official directive approved by the Commander‑in‑Chief and is considered a national security necessity because unidentified aerial activity could indicate new Russian weapons technology.

en.title: Ukrainian Defence Ministry Advisor Drops Bizarre UFOs Encountered By Military Amid Pentagon's Disclosure [WATCH]
en.summary: Serhii Beskrestnov, a senior advisor to Ukraine's Minister of Defense, revealed that the Ukrainian Armed Forces have a formal program for tracking and studying unidentified flying objects that has been active since the early days of the war with Russia. He said the program operates under an official directive approved by the Commander‑in‑Chief and is considered a national security necessity because unidentified aerial activity could indicate new Russian weapons technology.

de.title: Berater des ukrainischen Verteidigungsministeriums lässt bizarre UFOs fallen, auf die das Militär gestoßen ist, nachdem das Pentagon dies offengelegt hat [ANSCHAUEN]
de.summary: Serhii Beskrestnov, ein leitender Berater des ukrainischen Verteidigungsministers, gab bekannt, dass die ukrainischen Streitkräfte über ein formelles Programm zur Verfolgung und Untersuchung nicht identifizierter Flugobjekte verfügen, das seit den frühen Tagen des Krieges mit Russland aktiv ist. Er sagte, das Programm liege auf einer vom Oberbefehlshaber genehmigten offiziellen Weisung und werde als nationale Sicherheitsnotwendigkeit angesehen, da nicht identifizierte Luftaktivitäten auf neue russische Waffentechnologie hinweisen könnten.

articles.title: UAP whistleblower: Pilots are ‘still having' these encounters
articles.summary: Former Navy F‑18 pilot Ryan Graves, who has identified himself as a whistleblower on unidentified aerial phenomena, appeared on Fox News’s “The Big Weekend Show.” He discussed the Pentagon’s release of UFO and UAP footage. Graves said that pilots are still having encounters.

en.title: UAP whistleblower: Pilots are ‘still having' these encounters
en.summary: Former Navy F‑18 pilot Ryan Graves, who has identified himself as a whistleblower on unidentified aerial phenomena, appeared on Fox News’s “The Big Weekend Show.” He discussed the Pentagon’s release of UFO and UAP footage. Graves said that pilots are still having encounters.

de.title: UAP-Whistleblower: Piloten haben diese Begegnungen „immer noch“.
de.summary: Der ehemalige Navy-F-18-Pilot Ryan Graves, der sich selbst als Whistleblower zu unbekannten Luftphänomenen identifiziert hat, trat in der „The Big Weekend Show“ von Fox News auf. Er besprach die Veröffentlichung von UFO- und UAP-Aufnahmen durch das Pentagon. Graves sagte, dass Piloten immer noch Begegnungen hätten.

articles.title: CSEO head says declassified UAP releases mark new phase of disclosure | Cyprus inform
articles.summary: George Danos, head of Cyprus’s space exploration organisation, said the release of declassified UAP material marks a new phase of disclosure. He said the coming period could be key to determining whether humanity is alone or visited by advanced civilizations. The comments come after the US declassified and released files on UAPs, prompting hundreds of millions of people to download and watch the videos.

de.title: Laut CSEO-Chef markieren freigegebene UAP-Veröffentlichungen eine neue Phase der Offenlegung | Zypern informieren
de.summary: George Danos, Leiter der zyprischen Weltraumforschungsorganisation, sagte, die Veröffentlichung von freigegebenem UAP-Material markiert eine neue Phase der Offenlegung. Er sagte, die kommende Zeit könnte entscheidend dafür sein, ob die Menschheit allein ist oder von fortgeschrittenen Zivilisationen besucht wird. Die Kommentare kamen, nachdem die USA Dateien zu UAPs freigegeben und freigegeben hatten, was Hunderte Millionen Menschen dazu veranlasste, die Videos herunterzuladen und anzusehen.

articles.title: Pentagon: UFO website receives 340 million hits in first 12 hours
articles.summary: The Pentagon has reported that a website dedicated to unidentified flying objects received 340 million hits within its first 12 hours of launch. The claim was reported by NewsNation on May 9, 2026. The Pentagon’s statement underscores the significant public interest in UAPs.

de.title: Pentagon: UFO-Website erhält in den ersten 12 Stunden 340 Millionen Zugriffe
de.summary: Das Pentagon hat berichtet, dass eine Website, die sich mit nicht identifizierten Flugobjekten befasst, innerhalb der ersten 12 Stunden nach dem Start 340 Millionen Zugriffe verzeichnete. Die Behauptung wurde am 9. Mai 2026 von NewsNation gemeldet. Die Erklärung des Pentagons unterstreicht das große öffentliche Interesse an UAPs.

articles.title: Government Drops Massive UFO File Archive in Historic Public Release
articles.summary: GOV/UFO. The released materials include videos, photographs, reports, source documents, intelligence materials, and supporting records collected by multiple agencies such as the Department of War, ODNI, DOE, NASA, and the FBI. The initiative is described as a major transparency effort, with President Trump ordering agencies to declassify UAP records and officials stating that Americans can now examine the information independently.

en.title: Government Drops Massive UFO File Archive in Historic Public Release
en.summary: GOV/UFO. The released materials include videos, photographs, reports, source documents, intelligence materials, and supporting records collected by multiple agencies such as the Department of War, ODNI, DOE, NASA, and the FBI. The initiative is described as a major transparency effort, with President Trump ordering agencies to declassify UAP records and officials stating that Americans can now examine the information independently.

de.title: Regierung lässt riesiges UFO-Aktenarchiv in historischer Veröffentlichung fallen
de.summary: GOV/UFO. Zu den veröffentlichten Materialien gehören Videos, Fotos, Berichte, Quelldokumente, Geheimdienstmaterialien und unterstützende Aufzeichnungen, die von mehreren Behörden wie dem Kriegsministerium, ODNI, DOE, NASA und dem FBI gesammelt wurden. Die Initiative wird als große Transparenzbemühungen beschrieben, wobei Präsident Trump die Behörden anweist, UAP-Aufzeichnungen freizugeben, und Beamte erklären, dass die Amerikaner die Informationen nun unabhängig prüfen können.

articles.title: US releases new UFO files in transparency push
articles.summary: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper.

en.title: US releases new UFO files in transparency push
en.summary: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper.

de.title: Die USA veröffentlichen im Zuge der Transparenzoffensive neue UFO-Dateien
de.summary: Am 8. Mai 2026 veröffentlichte das US-Kriegsministerium seinen ersten Stapel freigegebener UAP-Datensätze und startete damit das öffentliche Archiv PURSUE, das nach Angaben der Trump-Regierung alle paar Wochen aktualisiert wird. Die Veröffentlichung folgt einer Anweisung von Präsident Trump vom 19. Februar 2026, die Bundesbehörden anweist, Dokumente im Zusammenhang mit außerirdischem Leben und UAP zu identifizieren, zu überprüfen und freizugeben. Sie umfasst Dutzende von Behörden und Dutzende Millionen Aufzeichnungen, viele davon nur auf Papier.

articles.title: Maternal stereotypes, ‘emotional’ AI jailbreaks and a perfect UFO sighting
articles.summary: Rebecca Liu wrote a long read that explores the overexposed but underdeveloped stereotype of Asian mothers, describing them as a common focus in therapy and popular culture. Jamie Bartlett spoke to AI safety experts who test large language models by tricking them into breaking their own rules, a process that can have a deep emotional cost. S.

de.title: Mütterliche Stereotypen, „emotionale“ KI-Jailbreaks und eine perfekte UFO-Sichtung
de.summary: Rebecca Liu hat eine lange Lektüre geschrieben, die das überbelichtete, aber unterentwickelte Stereotyp asiatischer Mütter untersucht und sie als einen gemeinsamen Schwerpunkt in Therapie und Populärkultur beschreibt. Jamie Bartlett sprach mit KI-Sicherheitsexperten, die große Sprachmodelle testen, indem sie sie dazu verleiten, ihre eigenen Regeln zu brechen, ein Prozess, der hohe emotionale Kosten verursachen kann. S.

en.title: Longmont’s UFO Files: National Database Details Decades Of Strange Sightings
en.summary: A national UFO database lists more than 100 reports from Longmont residents and travelers describing metallic spheres, triangular and chevron‑shaped craft, orange lights, green fireballs, and other unusual objects over the city. ” Earlier reports date back to 1998, when a family saw a large triangular craft near the airport, and 1999, when a saucer‑shaped object with flashing lights was observed from a window.

de.title: Longmonts UFO-Dateien: Nationale Datenbank beschreibt jahrzehntelange seltsame Sichtungen
de.summary: Eine nationale UFO-Datenbank listet mehr als 100 Berichte von Einwohnern und Reisenden von Longmont auf, in denen Metallkugeln, dreieckige und winkelförmige Fahrzeuge, orangefarbene Lichter, grüne Feuerbälle und andere ungewöhnliche Objekte über der Stadt beschrieben werden. „Frühere Berichte stammen aus dem Jahr 1998, als eine Familie ein großes dreieckiges Flugzeug in der Nähe des Flughafens sah, und aus dem Jahr 1999, als aus einem Fenster ein untertassenförmiges Objekt mit blinkenden Lichtern beobachtet wurde.

summaries.advisor-amid-bizarre-defence-disclosure-: Serhii Beskrestnov, a senior advisor to Ukraine's Minister of Defense, revealed that the Ukrainian Armed Forces have a formal program for tracking and studying unidentified flying objects that has been active since the early days of the war with Russia. He said the program operates under an official directive approved by the Commander‑in‑Chief and is considered a national security necessity because unidentified aerial activity could indicate new Russian weapons technology. Beskrestnov posted 2023 frontline reconnaissance footage of an aerial anomaly and later received a message from officials of a Ukrainian state institution that has handled such investigations since the Soviet era. He urged military personnel and civilians who capture unidentified objects on camera to submit their footage to uap@gur.gov.ua, noting that firsthand visual evidence could have significant intelligence value. His remarks came as the U.S. Pentagon released a declassified set of 162 UFO files on May 8, 2026, following a directive from President Trump.
summaries.encounters-having-pilots-still-whistlebl: Former Navy F‑18 pilot Ryan Graves, who has identified himself as a whistleblower on unidentified aerial phenomena, appeared on Fox News’s “The Big Weekend Show.” He discussed the Pentagon’s release of UFO and UAP footage. Graves said that pilots are still having encounters.
summaries.cseo-cyprus-declassified-disclosure-head: George Danos, head of Cyprus’s space exploration organisation, said the release of declassified UAP material marks a new phase of disclosure. He said the coming period could be key to determining whether humanity is alone or visited by advanced civilizations. The comments come after the US declassified and released files on UAPs, prompting hundreds of millions of people to download and watch the videos. Danos noted that public interest has grown rapidly and officials are now more willing to discuss incidents, with pilots now reporting sightings that were previously unreported. He added that some officials suggest humanity may not be alone and that the footage shows unusual flight dynamics unlikely to match known human technology, indicating a potential change in how incidents are handled and more visibility.
summaries.340-first-hits-hours-million-pentagon-re: The Pentagon has reported that a website dedicated to unidentified flying objects received 340 million hits within its first 12 hours of launch. The claim was reported by NewsNation on May 9, 2026. The Pentagon’s statement underscores the significant public interest in UAPs. No further details about the website’s ownership or content were provided in the brief. The report was included in a cluster of NewsNation sources focusing on Pentagon‑related UAP coverage.
summaries.archive-drops-file-government-historic-m: The Trump Administration has begun a rolling release of previously unseen federal files on UAP through the PURSUE initiative, making them available at WAR.GOV/UFO. The released materials include videos, photographs, reports, source documents, intelligence materials, and supporting records collected by multiple agencies such as the Department of War, ODNI, DOE, NASA, and the FBI. The initiative is described as a major transparency effort, with President Trump ordering agencies to declassify UAP records and officials stating that Americans can now examine the information independently. Many of the newly released files have not yet been fully analyzed for anomaly resolution, so some cases remain officially unexplained. The program involves a coordinated declassification review led by ODNI and the Department of War, with AARO overseeing operational review and NASA contributing scientific analysis, while the FBI emphasizes national security protections during the process.
summaries.files-push-releases-transparency: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper. The first tranche focuses on cases where the government cannot definitively determine the nature of the phenomena and contains Apollo 12 and 17 imagery, a cockpit transcript describing bright particles, FBI infrared images of unidentified objects over the western US in 2025, and military reports from incidents in the UAE, Greece, the Middle East, Africa, Japan, and North America. FBI Director Kash Patel said his agency handed over its first batch of classified UAP documents to the Pentagon‑led inter‑agency committee, while Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and DNI Tulsi Gabbard framed the release as evidence of the administration’s commitment to transparency and a joint declassification effort. The Department of War notes that many unresolved cases reflect insufficient data rather than anomalous capability, invites private‑sector analysis, and that the initiative’s success will depend on whether future tranches provide new operational detail rather than additional Apollo‑era curiosities and short infrared clips.
summaries.emotional-jailbreaks-maternal-perfect-si: Rebecca Liu wrote a long read that explores the overexposed but underdeveloped stereotype of Asian mothers, describing them as a common focus in therapy and popular culture. Jamie Bartlett spoke to AI safety experts who test large language models by tricking them into breaking their own rules, a process that can have a deep emotional cost. Zoe Williams examined a surge of Americans, including Paul, Ella, and Margot, renouncing U.S. citizenship despite the lengthy, costly process and potential retaliation. Daniel Lavelle highlighted the Rendlesham Forest UFO incident as a “perfect storm” case with multiple witnesses, military involvement, radar, radioactivity, ground traces, scorch marks, and declassified documents. Eromo Egbejule and Aisha Down wrote a gripping read on how civilians in Mali’s capital are coping with curfews and heightened security after a coordinated attack by jihadists and separatists, while Lam Tac Tam reflected on his 1976 journey as the first Vietnamese refugee to arrive by boat in Darwin.
summaries.database-decades-details-files-longmont-: A national UFO database lists more than 100 reports from Longmont residents and travelers describing metallic spheres, triangular and chevron‑shaped craft, orange lights, green fireballs, and other unusual objects over the city. Recent entries include a March 25 2025 sighting of a hovering metallic sphere that lasted about 20 minutes, an October 14 2025 dark triangular craft with white lights and a muted hum, and a January 27 2026 silver chevron‑shaped object that was classified by NUFORC as “Aircraft — Probable.” Earlier reports date back to 1998, when a family saw a large triangular craft near the airport, and 1999, when a saucer‑shaped object with flashing lights was observed from a window. The database notes that many sightings could be explained by aircraft, satellites, drones, weather balloons, or optical effects, and that NUFORC includes cautionary notes or possible explanations for each case. The reports provide a public record of what witnesses said they saw, but they do not constitute official confirmation of extraterrestrial activity, and no definitive conclusion has been reached.

en.title: Ukrainian Defence Ministry Advisor Drops Bizarre UFOs Encountered By Military Amid Pentagon's Disclosure [WATCH]
en.summary: Serhii Beskrestnov, a senior advisor to Ukraine's Minister of Defense, revealed that the Ukrainian Armed Forces have a formal program for tracking and studying unidentified flying objects that has been active since the early days of the war with Russia. He said the program operates under an official directive approved by the Commander‑in‑Chief and is considered a national security necessity because unidentified aerial activity could indicate new Russian weapons technology.

de.title: Berater des ukrainischen Verteidigungsministeriums lässt bizarre UFOs fallen, auf die das Militär gestoßen ist, nachdem das Pentagon dies offengelegt hat [ANSCHAUEN]
de.summary: Serhii Beskrestnov, ein leitender Berater des ukrainischen Verteidigungsministers, gab bekannt, dass die ukrainischen Streitkräfte über ein formelles Programm zur Verfolgung und Untersuchung nicht identifizierter Flugobjekte verfügen, das seit den frühen Tagen des Krieges mit Russland aktiv ist. Er sagte, das Programm liege auf einer vom Oberbefehlshaber genehmigten offiziellen Weisung und werde als nationale Sicherheitsnotwendigkeit angesehen, da nicht identifizierte Luftaktivitäten auf neue russische Waffentechnologie hinweisen könnten.

en.title: UAP whistleblower: Pilots are ‘still having' these encounters
en.summary: Former Navy F‑18 pilot Ryan Graves, who has identified himself as a whistleblower on unidentified aerial phenomena, appeared on Fox News’s “The Big Weekend Show.” He discussed the Pentagon’s release of UFO and UAP footage. Graves said that pilots are still having encounters.

de.title: UAP-Whistleblower: Piloten haben diese Begegnungen „immer noch“.
de.summary: Der ehemalige Navy-F-18-Pilot Ryan Graves, der sich selbst als Whistleblower zu unbekannten Luftphänomenen identifiziert hat, trat in der „The Big Weekend Show“ von Fox News auf. Er besprach die Veröffentlichung von UFO- und UAP-Aufnahmen durch das Pentagon. Graves sagte, dass Piloten immer noch Begegnungen hätten.

en.title: CSEO head says declassified UAP releases mark new phase of disclosure | Cyprus inform
en.summary: George Danos, head of Cyprus’s space exploration organisation, said the release of declassified UAP material marks a new phase of disclosure. He said the coming period could be key to determining whether humanity is alone or visited by advanced civilizations. The comments come after the US declassified and released files on UAPs, prompting hundreds of millions of people to download and watch the videos.

de.title: Laut CSEO-Chef markieren freigegebene UAP-Veröffentlichungen eine neue Phase der Offenlegung | Zypern informieren
de.summary: George Danos, Leiter der zyprischen Weltraumforschungsorganisation, sagte, die Veröffentlichung von freigegebenem UAP-Material markiert eine neue Phase der Offenlegung. Er sagte, die kommende Zeit könnte entscheidend dafür sein, ob die Menschheit allein ist oder von fortgeschrittenen Zivilisationen besucht wird. Die Kommentare kamen, nachdem die USA Dateien zu UAPs freigegeben und freigegeben hatten, was Hunderte Millionen Menschen dazu veranlasste, die Videos herunterzuladen und anzusehen.

en.title: Pentagon: UFO website receives 340 million hits in first 12 hours
en.summary: The Pentagon has reported that a website dedicated to unidentified flying objects received 340 million hits within its first 12 hours of launch. The claim was reported by NewsNation on May 9, 2026. The Pentagon’s statement underscores the significant public interest in UAPs.

de.title: Pentagon: UFO-Website erhält in den ersten 12 Stunden 340 Millionen Zugriffe
de.summary: Das Pentagon hat berichtet, dass eine Website, die sich mit nicht identifizierten Flugobjekten befasst, innerhalb der ersten 12 Stunden nach dem Start 340 Millionen Zugriffe verzeichnete. Die Behauptung wurde am 9. Mai 2026 von NewsNation gemeldet. Die Erklärung des Pentagons unterstreicht das große öffentliche Interesse an UAPs.

en.title: Government Drops Massive UFO File Archive in Historic Public Release
en.summary: GOV/UFO. The released materials include videos, photographs, reports, source documents, intelligence materials, and supporting records collected by multiple agencies such as the Department of War, ODNI, DOE, NASA, and the FBI. The initiative is described as a major transparency effort, with President Trump ordering agencies to declassify UAP records and officials stating that Americans can now examine the information independently.

de.title: Regierung lässt riesiges UFO-Aktenarchiv in historischer Veröffentlichung fallen
de.summary: GOV/UFO. Zu den veröffentlichten Materialien gehören Videos, Fotos, Berichte, Quelldokumente, Geheimdienstmaterialien und unterstützende Aufzeichnungen, die von mehreren Behörden wie dem Kriegsministerium, ODNI, DOE, NASA und dem FBI gesammelt wurden. Die Initiative wird als große Transparenzbemühungen beschrieben, wobei Präsident Trump die Behörden anweist, UAP-Aufzeichnungen freizugeben, und Beamte erklären, dass die Amerikaner die Informationen nun unabhängig prüfen können.

en.title: US releases new UFO files in transparency push
en.summary: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper.

de.title: Die USA veröffentlichen im Zuge der Transparenzoffensive neue UFO-Dateien
de.summary: Am 8. Mai 2026 veröffentlichte das US-Kriegsministerium seinen ersten Stapel freigegebener UAP-Datensätze und startete damit das öffentliche Archiv PURSUE, das nach Angaben der Trump-Regierung alle paar Wochen aktualisiert wird. Die Veröffentlichung folgt einer Anweisung von Präsident Trump vom 19. Februar 2026, die Bundesbehörden anweist, Dokumente im Zusammenhang mit außerirdischem Leben und UAP zu identifizieren, zu überprüfen und freizugeben. Sie umfasst Dutzende von Behörden und Dutzende Millionen Aufzeichnungen, viele davon nur auf Papier.

en.title: Maternal stereotypes, ‘emotional’ AI jailbreaks and a perfect UFO sighting
en.summary: Rebecca Liu wrote a long read that explores the overexposed but underdeveloped stereotype of Asian mothers, describing them as a common focus in therapy and popular culture. Jamie Bartlett spoke to AI safety experts who test large language models by tricking them into breaking their own rules, a process that can have a deep emotional cost. S.

de.title: Mütterliche Stereotypen, „emotionale“ KI-Jailbreaks und eine perfekte UFO-Sichtung
de.summary: Rebecca Liu hat eine lange Lektüre geschrieben, die das überbelichtete, aber unterentwickelte Stereotyp asiatischer Mütter untersucht und sie als einen gemeinsamen Schwerpunkt in Therapie und Populärkultur beschreibt. Jamie Bartlett sprach mit KI-Sicherheitsexperten, die große Sprachmodelle testen, indem sie sie dazu verleiten, ihre eigenen Regeln zu brechen, ein Prozess, der hohe emotionale Kosten verursachen kann. S.

en.title: Longmont’s UFO Files: National Database Details Decades Of Strange Sightings
en.summary: A national UFO database lists more than 100 reports from Longmont residents and travelers describing metallic spheres, triangular and chevron‑shaped craft, orange lights, green fireballs, and other unusual objects over the city. ” Earlier reports date back to 1998, when a family saw a large triangular craft near the airport, and 1999, when a saucer‑shaped object with flashing lights was observed from a window.

de.title: Longmonts UFO-Dateien: Nationale Datenbank beschreibt jahrzehntelange seltsame Sichtungen
de.summary: Eine nationale UFO-Datenbank listet mehr als 100 Berichte von Einwohnern und Reisenden von Longmont auf, in denen Metallkugeln, dreieckige und winkelförmige Fahrzeuge, orangefarbene Lichter, grüne Feuerbälle und andere ungewöhnliche Objekte über der Stadt beschrieben werden. „Frühere Berichte stammen aus dem Jahr 1998, als eine Familie ein großes dreieckiges Flugzeug in der Nähe des Flughafens sah, und aus dem Jahr 1999, als aus einem Fenster ein untertassenförmiges Objekt mit blinkenden Lichtern beobachtet wurde.
